name: Crown Seal Public Company Limited
summary: Crown Seal Public Company Limited manufactures and distributes crowns and caps for bottles in Thailand and internationally. It operates through Manufacture and Sale of Caps; and Hire of Printing Sheets for Can segments. The company's products include crowns, pilfer-proof, Maxi crown, Maxi, Maxi-PG, plastic, and composite caps, which are used as container seals for various drinks, such as carbonated drinks, soy milk drinks, beers, soda water and energy drinks, fruit juices, liquors, chicken essences, bird's nests, and medical supplies, etc.; hand-crowners; and Maxi crimping machines. It also provides coating and printing services on steel plates and aluminum sheets. Crown Seal Public Company Limited was founded in 1968 and is headquartered in Thanyaburi, Thailand.
